scripts.start:prod: npx sequelize-cli db:migrate --config config/sequelize-config.js && npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all --config config/sequelize-config.js && node server.js
scripts.db:test: node -e "require('./config/database').authenticate().then(() => { console.log('✅ DB connected'); process.exit(0); }).catch(e => { console.error('❌', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
